issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1373: remaining Python asset sweep 3/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero before BIG-GO-1373 changes, and repeated `origin/main` movement prevented a clean direct push there during this lane.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `f1d2fa35`.
The finalized lane commit was pushed to `origin/BIG-GO-1373` after repeated non-fast-forward rejections and one transient GitHub TLS failure during push retries.
